text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka and I have come to the riverside
to run.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What great weather. The sun is shining so bright—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove gave me some sunscreen the other
day because she said my skin looked a little
agitated.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I should go back home to get it. Sigh... If only the weather wasn't so nice, then I wouldn't need it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But wait... If the weather were bad, then it
wouldn't feel good to run anyway...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't take too long for Silence Suzuka to
return from her room, but she seems a little down
about losing some running time.
